title: Verack group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Verack_carg.jpg|thumb|right|250px]]
Two [[Cargo ferry|Cargo Ferries]] from '''''Verack''''' group brought Experimental technology to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]], [[Habeen]] Ferries ''Verack'' docked with Zaarin's [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'' as part of an arranged deal for Admiral Zaarin to inspect prototypes for new hyperdrive systems suitable for the [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]]. ''Verack 1 & 2'' withstood heavy fire from [[Nharwaak]] dissidents during the transfer, yet all cargo arrived into Imperial hands unharmed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
